about.intro: I am Furqan Ahmad Bhat from Baramulla, currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Data Science and Physics. I focus on building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems rather than just theoretical models.
about.approach: I approach problems from a systems perspective — understanding input, processing, and output — and then designing scalable and efficient solutions using data-driven methods.
about.focus: My core interest lies in integrating Machine Learning, IoT, and real-world deployment to build systems that are practical, impactful, and scalable.

projects.title: Apple Grading System (AGS)
projects.description: An end-to-end intelligent system that uses computer vision and CNN models to classify apples based on quality, color, and defects.
projects.problem: Manual grading of apples is inconsistent, slow, and labor-intensive, leading to inefficiency and inaccurate classification.
projects.solution: Developed a CNN-based system that analyzes apple images and classifies them into quality categories automatically.
projects.system: Image Capture → Preprocessing → CNN Model → Classification → Sorting
projects.impact: Improves accuracy, reduces human effort, and enables scalable automation in agriculture.

projects.title: Tiwzz (Startup)
projects.description: A startup initiative focused on connecting rural restaurants with nearby customers through a hyperlocal delivery system.
projects.problem: Small rural restaurants lack visibility and struggle to reach customers, resulting in low daily income.
projects.solution: Built a system that connects customers with nearby restaurants within a 10–15 km radius, improving accessibility.
projects.system: Restaurant Onboarding → Order Placement → Delivery → Payment
projects.impact: Increases income of small businesses and strengthens the local economy.

projects.title: IoT Health Monitoring Device
projects.description: An IoT-based system designed to help partially paralyzed patients by predicting urination timing and alerting caregivers in advance.
projects.problem: Patients depend heavily on caregivers for basic needs, affecting independence and dignity.
projects.solution: Created a predictive system using sensor data to identify patterns and trigger alerts before events occur.
projects.system: Sensor Data → Pattern Detection → Prediction → Alert
projects.impact: Improves patient dignity, reduces caregiver workload, and enhances overall care efficiency.
